reason: Successfully tested agent chat functionality by sending a math question and verifying the agent responded with the correct answer.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with sidebar showing three agents including "QA-20260424-163534-xroq" with idle status.
Clicked on the "QA-20260424-163534-xroq" agent in the sidebar — Agent detail page loaded with the agent home/chat interface displayed.
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Agent status indicator shows "idle" which satisfies the requirement.
Typed message "Hello! What is 2+2?" in the message input field — Message appeared correctly in the input field.

Clicked send button to submit the message — Message was sent successfully; the chat view opened with the user message visible and the agent status changed to "working" with a timer showing "Working..." indicator.
Waited up to 3 minutes for agent response — Agent responded within 2 seconds as indicated by "Worked for 2s" timer.

Verified response mentions "4" and captured screenshot — The agent response clearly displays "4" (the correct answer to 2+2). Screenshot captured showing the complete conversation with user message "Hello! What is 2+2?" and agent response "4", with agent status showing "idle" after completion. Session was automatically named "Basic Math Question with QA Agent".
